name: CHEETAH NET SUPPLY CHAIN SERVICE INC.
sic_description: Wholesale-Motor Vehicles & Motor Vehicle Parts & Supplies
summary: PART I . Overview We are a provider of logistics and warehousing services, historically in connection with the sale of parallel-import vehicles sourced in the U.S. to be sold in the PRC market, and more recently for the transportation of other goods between the U.S. and the PRC. Parallel-import vehicles in the PRC refer to automobiles purchased directly from overseas markets and imported for sale outside of the brand manufacturers official distribution networks.
